title: Homelab Agent Tools
description: Agent-safe commands and when to use them in this repo

tools.name: check
tools.when: After any structural or config change before declaring done

tools.name: lint-agents
tools.when: When modifying Terraform, Makefile, CI workflows, or AGENTS.md

tools.name: fix-network
tools.when: When check-network fails due to missing or extra hosts

tools.name: syntax-check
tools.when: After editing any Ansible playbook, role, or inventory variable

tools.name: dry-run
tools.when: Before running a playbook on a live host (see AGENTS.md for check-mode caveats)

tools.name: play
tools.when: To apply Ansible configuration to a specific VM

tools.name: add-vm
tools.when: Scaffolding a new Proxmox LXC container

tools.name: add-service
tools.command: make add-service NAME=<name> DISPLAY_NAME='<name>' HOST=<host> PORT=<port>

tools.name: rotate-secret
tools.when: Rotating a value in an Ansible vault

tools.name: agent-log
tools.when: After completing a significant manual or automated task

tools.name: agent-decision
tools.when: When making a non-obvious design choice that future agents should know about
